recommendations.title: In the Shadow of the Moon

recommendations.title: Burning Bright

recommendations.title: Zombeavers
recommendations.overview: College friends find their weekend of sex and debauchery ruined when deadly zombie beavers swarm their riverside cabin.

recommendations.title: Stranger in the Woods
recommendations.overview: Olivia and her friends go on a vacation. After Olivia nearly drowns with a slit wrist in her bathtub after her fiancé's funeral, her friends suspect that she tried to kill herself, but she believes someone attacked her.

recommendations.title: Cursed
recommendations.overview: A werewolf loose in Los Angeles changes the lives of three young adults who, after being mauled by the beast, learn that the only way to break the curse put upon them is to kill the one who started it all.
